example.input: Job Title: Senior AI Engineer Company: TechNova Required Skills: Python, RAG architectures, FastAPI, Docker Profile Summary: 5 years of Python backend engineering, strong experience building enterprise RAG pipelines and deploying via Docker/FastAPI.
example.thought: The candidate possesses all 4 core requirements listed in the job description. The experience level matches the 'Senior' title. The RAG architecture knowledge is a direct match.

example.input: Job Title: Frontend Developer Company: DataCorp Required Skills: Vue.js, PHP, Nuxt Profile Summary: Senior React/Next.js engineer. Python backend expert.
example.thought: The job strictly requires Vue.js and PHP. The candidate has no experience in these stacks, only React and Python.
